meaning: n.[动]绒(美洲产小型长尾猴)
examples: The next time you see a cute little marmoset, don't make a noise, just keep quiet.
Marmoset fathers on the other hand are a model of paternal devotion.
Either way, next time you see a cute little marmoset, forget “oooh” or “awwww” or “ee-ee-ee。”Try shhhh。
In a pet store once, I managed to feed a marmoset being kept in a birdcage.
